name: Easy Caramel Chocolate Sticky Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread frosting evenly in the bottom of a lightly greased 9-inch square pan.
2. Arrange pecan halves over the frosting.
3. Separate the biscuits and flatten each to about 1/4 inch thickness.
4. Place a chocolate kiss on one side of the center of each biscuit.
5. Fold the biscuit in half, forming a semicircle, and gently press the edges to seal.
6. Repeat with the remaining biscuits and chocolate kisses.
7. Arrange the biscuits over the pecans, placing the flat sides down.
8. Bake at 375°F for 28 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 5 minutes before inverting onto a serving plate and serving immediately.
